message: 18th duplicate assignment detected. STOP ALL TASK ASSIGNMENTS immediately.

immediate: Manual database update for tasks #9431 and #9433
Root cause investigation of database layer
do_not: DO NOT restart task assignments until DB sync verified fixed

task_9431.sql: UPDATE tasks SET status = 'COMPLETE', assignable = FALSE, lock_reason = 'EMERGENCY: 18 duplicates' WHERE task_id = 9431

task_9433.sql: UPDATE tasks SET status = 'COMPLETE', assignable = FALSE, lock_reason = 'EMERGENCY: 16 duplicates' WHERE task_id = 9433

system_shutdown.sql: UPDATE system_config SET task_assignment_enabled = FALSE, reason = 'Emergency shutdown - DB sync failure'

root_cause: Database write failures - status updates not persisting
recommendation: EMERGENCY SYSTEM SHUTDOWN until database synchronization is fixed and verified
